TASK: USER-20260518-bootstrap
Status: in_progress
Current: Implement memory_bootstrap server contract
Updated: 2026-05-18T09:00:00Z
DECISION: memory_bootstrap is read-only and returns contract plus summary for plugin startup.
USER: prefer server-side primitives over plugin-side reconstruction when behavior is shared.
RESEARCH: Agent memory systems benefit from bootstrap, observation capture, audit, and trace surfaces.
CONTEXT: Recovery command: cargo test --lib server::logic; Path: src/server/logic/bootstrap.rs
